{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114392290635B93D6B03BE9E016"}"},"total":3222},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578366922374365976","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好好看！！！！兄弟俩真的绝了，就要这种！也不要虐，也不要cp，兄弟俩就这样就非常完美！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764478989,"group_id":"7569244441353931800","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyun6Hjn4f0EIBNJU33Xn+vDPjb7MigTD502RBooYqAz","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dfa6f71eb56243f48e5a0613d9d3e482~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616124&x-signature=xswTXvXBG0VzEp7UcZqf%2Bi%2FJEIY%3D","user_id":"1213467815065567","user_name":"露露露白"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1213467815065567","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7569244441353931800","book_info":{"abstract":"【兄弟联手，无女主，微群像，爽文不卑微，后期双强天花板，轻松向】
感谢天元大陆的邀请，已落户本界顶级修真家族，一切都好。
就是我发现我的仙帝弟弟好像有厌庶癖。
对了，我是他庶长兄。
救！请问我该怎么活？！
……
后来，诸天神魔欲要伐他，我执枪而立，重瞳寂灭万法。
“动他，问过我这当兄长的了吗？”
——文案2
云擎胎穿成修仙界顶级世家庶长子，
好消息，身负混沌道胎和上古重瞳，此生握日摘星、道途有望。
坏消息，他有一个极度厌恶庶子的嫡出弟弟，主打一个嫡嫡道道。
坏坏消息，他弟弟是仙帝转世，未来将登临绝巅，威断万古。
云擎：……啥也别说了弟，抱大腿哈。
于是他温柔体贴，亦兄亦臣，努力扮演着完美兄长。
初见时，云煌冷眼睥睨：“庶子面君，需跪地应答。”
再后来，他于万众之前宣告：“见兄长，如见我。”
云擎：“……”
说好的冷酷无情、厌恶庶出呢？
弟啊，你的剧本是不是拿错了？！

#说好的苟命怎么我弟弟变成兄控了
#弟弟他好像不需要我演了他来真的
#你怎么知道我和煌弟天下第一好嘻嘻嘻
云擎：柔范韬仪，“生存吐槽双大师”穿越庶长子

回归正题：主线跟简介差不多，但很难得的是这是一篇非常非常棒的群像文！！！而且云家跟我以前看的修仙界第一世家真的很不一样！而且作者大大功力很深，写的文能做到兄弟俩既好磕而全文风格又维持在男频该有的幽默热血！一句话，仙品！总之，这就是一篇既适合男生看也适合女生看的小说，当然作者大大要是能多发点存稿就好了[害羞]","text_exts":[{"e":111,"s":108,"text":"修仙界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740751623BE9E016%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227595006377761850136%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227569244441353931800%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768354142,"group_id":"7569244441353931800","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"来呀~快活呀~反正有~大把书看~ＯＫ(ゝω・´★)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4MSQFUaTJsuMd+wURruBipX4TWnT9Wus3p+Szi8bioY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b3445dff77464807afff43e46fcd0d54~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619799&x-signature=z59mL5UG4zb7H%2B4T2shzuUWJBEc%3D","user_id":"1179157292384712","user_name":"天呢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1179157292384712","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1737573159,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","titl
